entry.title: Lakera Guard
entry.description: AI security platform for detecting prompt injection, unsafe content, data leakage, and LLM application abuse.
entry.seoTitle: Lakera Guard AI security for LLM apps
entry.seoDescription: Lakera Guard helps detect prompt injection, unsafe content, data leakage, and abuse in LLM applications. HeyClaude adds source links, install steps,...
entry.author: Lakera
entry.cardDescription: AI security guardrails for LLM applications.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Lakera Guard is relevant for teams that need runtime protection and policy checks around LLM application inputs and outputs.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
